$description: Non-severity clinical status modifiers. Structurally separate from clinical.severity.* — must never share a slot with severity.

attended.$description: Clinician is actively engaged with this alert/patient (legacy ASSISTIDO concept). Additive overlay — never replaces true severity.

stale.$description: Underlying data exceeded staleness_max; displayed severity may not reflect current state.

color.$description: Gray dot, clock-alert icon, dashed border. Dims confidence, never downgrades severity.
